name: Easton Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Leavenworth USD 453 and Basehor-Linwood School Districts (exclusive provider)
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax PE-backed) on January 3, 2024 alongside Cedar Bus Company (Buffalo, NY). Now part of Beacon's 25-company national platform.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Already acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax PE) Jan 2024. Competitor platform consolidating regional operators.

name: Sikorski Bus Co LLC
owner_or_parent: All-Star Transportation LLC (Dufour family, Waterbury CT)
principals: Hank Sikorski (former owner, sold 2012); John Dufour (All-Star owner)
districts_or_customers: Burlington and Harwinton, CT school children (legacy customers, now operated under All-Star)
recent_news: Acquired by All-Star Transportation of Waterbury in 2012. Hank Sikorski had run the business 50 years after taking over from his father. Now legacy LLC under All-Star which serves 47,000+ students daily across CT.
fit_notes: NOT a standalone target - Sikorski entity is owned by All-Star Transportation (family-owned, ~850 vehicles, 18 terminals in CT). All-Star itself could be a Summit interest as a larger family-owned regional consolidator.

name: Van Pool Transportation
owner_or_parent: Beacon Mobility Corp (Audax Private Equity / AG Van Pool Holdings - Apollo)
districts_or_customers: 100+ school districts across MA, CT, NH, VT serving 5,000+ students; bases in Wilbraham, Barre, Hudson, Fitchburg, Wrentham, Duxbury
recent_news: Van Pool is the active acquisition vehicle for Beacon Mobility / AG Van Pool Holdings (Apollo). Has acquired NRT Bus & Trombly (2019/2021), DS Bus Lines (2022), Royal Coach (2023), PLSIII (2023), Butler's Bus (2024), Transaction Corporate Shuttles (2024), We Transport/Huntington Coach group (2025), George M. Carroll (2025), Specialty Transportation (2026).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Van Pool is the active roll-up arm of Beacon Mobility (Audax / Apollo) - direct competitor to Summit. Hudson MA location is one of many bases for this national PE platform.

name: Limousine Service Of BP Corp
districts_or_customers: Newark area school district contractor (listed on NJ DOE 2020-21 contractor codes); category: school bus service
recent_news: No M&A or notable news found. Small Newark-based operator registered with FMCSA (DOT 979181), classified under educational services / school bus service.
fit_notes: Very small ~8 vehicle Newark NJ school bus contractor. Independent appearance but ambiguous business name ('Limousine Service') suggests possible mixed school/livery operation. Likely too small to be a meaningful tuck-in but could fit Summit's NJ density build; verify operations and license type before outreach.

name: Hopkins Transportation
districts_or_customers: Scituate RI area school bus services; ~55 years in business per local listings
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Long-standing local family operator (reportedly 55+ years), small fleet, no website beyond basic hub.biz business listing.
fit_notes: Small RI family-owned operator with 55-year history under Kenneth Hopkins - classic succession candidate profile. Limited scale (~$459K revenue, 12 employees) makes it a small tuck-in; would only fit if Summit is building RI density or acquiring multiple small RI operators.
